metadata.title: Serial Number Generator for Excel - Bulk Number Lists
metadata.description: Generate serial number sequences for Excel with prefixes, padding, formulas, TXT output, and CSV previews.

hero.title: Serial number generator for Excel
hero.description: Create SN-000001, ASSET-1001, equipment tags, and warranty lists without dragging formulas through a spreadsheet.

announcement.title: For asset sheets, equipment lists, and product serial imports

intent.title: Build clean serial number lists for spreadsheet workflows
intent.description: Serial numbers often need fixed prefixes, leading zeros, and predictable increments. Generate the list once, then paste formulas or export fixed values.

items.title: Asset-friendly prefixes
items.description: Use SN, SERIAL, ASSET, EQP, or a short department code before the number.

items.title: Sorted padded numbers
items.description: Create SN-000001 style labels that keep the same width and sort correctly.

items.title: CSV-ready output
items.description: Copy Excel formulas, paste fixed values, or download CSV/TXT for import sheets.

workflow.title: How to make serial numbers in Excel
workflow.description: Use the generator when a manual fill handle is too slow or easy to misalign.

items.title: Choose the serial prefix
items.description: For example, use SN, ASSET, or SERIAL with a hyphen separator.

items.title: Set count, start, and padding
items.description: Start from the next available number and choose the zero padding that matches your sheet.

items.title: Copy the output
items.description: Use formulas inside Excel or export fixed values when another system needs an import file.

related.title: Related inventory numbering pages
related.description: Pick the workflow that matches the list you need to create.

items.title: SKU sequences
items.description: For product, catalog, and marketplace item labels.

items.title: Purchase order numbers
items.description: For PO-10001 style procurement lists and vendor sheets.

items.title: Bulk row labels
items.description: For tickets, batches, rows, and general list labels.

items.question: Can I generate SN-000001 style numbers?
items.answer: Yes. Use SN as the prefix, a hyphen separator, start at 1, and set zero padding to 6.

items.question: Can I export serial numbers as CSV?
items.answer: Yes. Generate the sequence, preview the CSV output, then download or copy the values into your spreadsheet workflow.

items.question: Is this a serial number database?
items.answer: No. It generates spreadsheet-ready sequences. Keep official product or asset records in your inventory system.

cta.title: Generate serial numbers now
cta.description: Open the generator, enter your serial pattern, and copy the output back to Excel.
